name: Natural Wave Bob
description: A chic shoulder-length wavy bob wig with a natural hairline. Perfect for everyday wear.

name: Long Straight Silk
description: Sleek and silky long straight wig that falls past the shoulders. Heat-resistant fiber.

name: Curly Afro Volume
description: Full and voluminous curly afro wig. Bouncy curls with a natural look and feel.

name: Blonde Highlight Waves
description: Gorgeous blonde highlighted wavy wig with dimension and movement. Beach-wave inspired.

name: Pixie Cut Classic
description: A timeless pixie cut wig that's easy to style and maintain. Lightweight and comfortable.

name: Auburn Red Layers
description: Rich auburn red layered wig with face-framing layers. Adds warmth and dimension.

name: Deep Wave Lace Front
description: Premium deep wave lace front wig with a natural-looking hairline. Pre-plucked.

name: Platinum Bob
description: Trendy platinum blonde bob wig. Sharp cut with a modern edge. Turns heads everywhere.

name: Ombre Long Straight
description: Stunning ombre wig transitioning from dark roots to lighter ends. Extra long length.

name: Kinky Curly Natural
description: Beautiful kinky curly wig that mimics natural hair texture. Lightweight and breathable.

name: Burgundy Body Wave
description: Bold burgundy body wave wig with gorgeous color and movement. Statement-making style.

name: Honey Blonde Curls
description: Warm honey blonde wig with loose, romantic curls. Soft and touchable texture.

name: Short Layered Shag
description: Trendy short layered shag wig with lots of texture and volume. Effortlessly cool.

name: Jet Black Bone Straight
description: Ultra-sleek bone straight wig in jet black. Mirror-like shine and dramatic length.

name: Rose Gold Fantasy
description: Dreamy rose gold colored wig with soft waves. Unique fashion color for bold looks.
